title: Scheduled Tasks
subtitle: Automate AI workflows with scheduled tasks
gatewayWarning: Gateway is not running. Scheduled tasks cannot be managed without an active Gateway.

empty.title: No scheduled tasks
empty.description: Create scheduled tasks to automate AI workflows. Tasks can send messages, run queries, or perform actions at specified times.

card.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this task?

dialog.messagePlaceholder: What should the AI do? e.g., Give me a summary of today's news and weather
dialog.deliveryDescription: Choose whether this task stays in JitClaw or is pushed to an external channel.
dialog.deliveryModeNoneDesc: Run the task and keep the result in the app.
dialog.deliveryModeAnnounceDesc: Send the final result through a configured channel.
dialog.deliveryAccountDesc: Uses the same configured account list shown on the Channels page.
dialog.deliveryChannelUnsupported: WeChat does not currently support scheduled outbound delivery because the plugin requires a live conversation context token.
dialog.noDeliveryTargets: No delivery targets are available for the selected {{channel}} account.
dialog.deliveryTargetPlaceholder: Enter the delivery target for this channel
dialog.deliveryTargetDesc: This maps to delivery.to in OpenClaw and is sent as-is.
dialog.deliveryTargetDescFeishu: Use a Feishu user target like user:ou_xxx or a chat target like chat:oc_xxx.
dialog.deliveryTargetDescAuto: Select from targets discovered for the chosen channel account.
dialog.deliveryTargetDescFeishuSelect: Select a verified Feishu recipient from the available users or chats.
dialog.deliveryTargetDescFeishuAccount: Choose from the configured Feishu channel accounts, using the same account list as the Channels page.
dialog.feishuMainTargetDesc: Auto-fill the current default Feishu account owner as the delivery target.
dialog.noChannels: No channels available. Add a channel first.
dialog.discordChannelIdDesc: Right-click the Discord channel → Copy Channel ID
dialog.enableImmediatelyDesc: Start running this task after creation

toast.deliveryChannelUnsupported: {{channel}} does not support scheduled delivery yet
toast.failedResolveDeliveryTarget: Failed to resolve the default delivery target
toast.discordIdRequired: Please enter a Discord Channel ID
toast.scheduleRequired: Please select or enter a schedule
